name: FourLeaf Federal Credit Union
description_short: FourLeaf Federal Credit Union is a full-service credit union offering personal and business banking, lending, mortgages, and investment services with branches in New York City.
description_long: FourLeaf Federal Credit Union operates as a comprehensive financial institution providing banking and lending services to both personal and business customers. The credit union maintains a physical presence in Chelsea, New York City, and serves members through multiple channels including digital banking platforms. The institution offers a broad range of personal banking services including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit, money market accounts, and IRAs. On the lending side, they provide auto loans, personal loans, credit cards, student loan refinancing, and comprehensive home lending products including mortgages, refinancing, and home equity lines of credit. For business customers, FourLeaf FCU provides dedicated business checking and savings accounts, business lending including term loans and commercial real estate financing, and payment processing solutions. FourLeaf FCU distinguishes itself through integrated wealth management and investment services via FourLeaf Financial Group, offering guided wealth portfolios, college planning, retirement planning, and insurance products including auto, homeowners, and life insurance. They provide comprehensive digital banking capabilities with online banking, mobile banking, and virtual appointment services. The credit union also emphasizes financial education through free seminars, webinars, and learning centers covering auto purchases, credit, savings, mortgages, and HELOCs, plus access to credit counseling services. As a credit union operating under routing number 221473652, FourLeaf FCU is member-owned and subject to cooperative banking principles. Customers should contact the institution directly at 1-800-628-7070 to understand membership requirements and current product offerings.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Comprehensive product suite spanning personal and business banking, lending, mortgages, and investment services
Integrated investment and wealth management through FourLeaf Financial Group with guided portfolios and retirement planning
Full digital banking suite including online banking, mobile banking, and virtual appointment services with Zelle integration
Extensive financial education resources including free seminars, webinars, and learning centers for auto, credit, mortgages, and HELOCs
Dedicated business banking division with specialized lending products including commercial real estate financing and payment solutions
Member access to credit counseling and fraud/security resources
Physical branch presence in Chelsea, New York City for in-person service
cons: Website does not display current interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules for any products
Specific membership eligibility requirements and minimum balance information not provided
Limited geographic presence information — only Chelsea branch mentioned on provided content
No details on loan approval timelines, processing fees, or product-specific terms and conditions visible
best_for: New York City-area residents and businesses seeking full-service banking with in-person branch access
Customers interested in integrated wealth management and investment services alongside traditional banking
Small business owners needing dedicated business banking, lending, and payment processing solutions
Members prioritizing digital banking convenience combined with comprehensive financial education resources
diagnosis: FourLeaf Federal Credit Union is best for New York City-area consumers and businesses seeking comprehensive, integrated banking and lending services with digital convenience and in-person support. The primary caveat is that detailed product terms, current rates, eligibility requirements, and fee structures are not publicly available on the website—prospective members must contact the institution directly for specific product information before joining.
services: Personal checking accounts (free checking and student checking)
Personal savings products (savings accounts, money market accounts, certificates, IRAs)
Home lending (mortgages, refinancing, home equity lines of credit, pre-qualification)
Business lending (term loans, lines of credit, commercial real estate lending, business auto loans, business credit cards)
Investment and wealth management services (guided portfolios, college planning, retirement planning)
Insurance products (auto, homeowners, life insurance, debt protection)
Digital banking (online banking, mobile banking, Zelle, virtual appointments)
Business payment solutions (Zelle for business, credit card processing, remote deposit capture)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: FourLeaf Federal Credit Union offers personal and business banking, lending, mortgages, and investments with NYC branches.
